name: inspired-product
description: Build empowered product teams using discovery and delivery dual-track. Use when the user mentions "product discovery", "empowered teams", "feature factory", "product roadmap", "opportunity assessment", "product vision", "product-led growth", "discovery vs delivery", "what should we build", "our roadmap is just a feature list", or "set our product strategy". Also trigger when restructuring product teams away from output-driven models, setting product strategy, or deciding what to build next based
author: wondelai
